display.purpose: Hero name only. Stacks vertically at large breakpoints.

headline.purpose: Section titles. Always uppercase. Stroke-paired format.

title.purpose: Experience role names and project names.

body.purpose: Experience highlights, descriptions, summary paragraph. Max 65–75ch.

label.purpose: All metadata, section tags, status readouts, timestamps, prompts.

shadows.name: teal-glow-hover
shadows.purpose: State-change signal on interactive nodes (timeline dots, nav icons) on group hover. Not decorative.

motion.name: ease-expo-out
motion.purpose: Primary easing for all entrances, CTA hover fills, panel swaps.

motion.name: ease-linear
motion.purpose: Infinite scroll animations only (tech stack columns in Hero).

motion.name: spring-scroll
motion.purpose: StatusBar scroll progress spring. Framer Motion useSpring config.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Solid Signal Teal CTA. Used for primary navigation actions (Deploy Blueprints).
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">DEPLOY_BLUEPRINTS <svg width="16" height="16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M14 5l7 7m0 0l-7 7m7-7H3"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; background: #2dd4f0; color: #07111f; border: 1px solid #2dd4f0; border-radius: 0; padding: 16px 32px; font-family: 'Fira Code', 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #26bcd9; } .ds-btn-primary svg { transition: transform 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover svg { transform: translateX(4px); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Transparent outline button for secondary actions (GitHub, LinkedIn).
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: transparent; color: #dde8f5; border: 1px solid #1a3a6a; border-radius: 0; padding: 16px 32px; font-family: 'Fira Code', 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s ease-out, color 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #2dd4f0; color: #2dd4f0; }

components.name: Nav Icon
components.description: Fixed right-rail nav item. 32x32px icon box. Active = Signal Teal border.
components.css: .ds-nav-icon { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 32px; height: 32px; border: 1px solid #1a3a6a; background: #07111f; color: rgba(91,164,245,0.7); border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s, transform 0.2s; } .ds-nav-icon:hover { border-color: #2dd4f0; color: #2dd4f0; transform: scale(1.12); } .ds-nav-icon--active { border-color: #2dd4f0; color: #f0f8ff; outline: 1px solid rgba(255,120,50,0.7); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input Field
components.description: Bottom-border-only input. Monospace, left-aligned with a › prompt glyph.
components.html: ›
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; } .ds-input-prompt { position: absolute; left: 0; font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace; color: #2dd4f0; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1; pointer-events: none; } .ds-input { width: 100%; background: transparent; border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #1a3a6a; border-radius: 0; padding: 10px 8px 10px 24px; font-family: 'Fira Code', 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #f0f8ff; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(91,164,245,0.35); } .ds-input:focus { border-bottom-color: #2dd4f0; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.4; }

components.name: Section Separator
components.description: Signature section opener. Number chip + full-width rule + machine tag. Identical grammar across all four sections.
components.css: .ds-section-sep { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; } .ds-section-sep__num { font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; color: #2dd4f0; letter-spacing: 0.2em; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-section-sep__line { flex: 1; height: 1px; background: #1a3a6a; } .ds-section-sep__tag { font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace; font-size: 0.625rem; color: rgba(221,232,245,0.3); letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-section-sep__accent { width: 48px; height: 1px; background: rgba(45,212,240,0.5); flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Timeline Entry
components.description: Experience log entry. Left-border timeline with square node, role header, and bulleted highlights.
components.html:
Software EngineerInsight Enterprises
  • ›Architected a production LLM-as-a-service platform on Azure.
components.css: .ds-timeline { position: relative; padding-left: 32px; border-left: 1px solid #1a3a6a; } .ds-timeline__node { position: absolute; left: -5px; top: 4px; width: 8px; height: 8px; background: #1a3a6a; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-timeline:hover .ds-timeline__node { background: #2dd4f0; transform: scale(1.5); box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(45,212,240,0.5); } .ds-timeline__connector { position: absolute; left: -32px; top: 6px; width: 32px; height: 1px; background: #1a3a6a; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-timeline:hover .ds-timeline__connector { background: #2dd4f0; } .ds-timeline__body { padding-left: 24px; } .ds-timeline__role { display: block; font-family: 'Exo 2', sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; color: #f0f8ff; } .ds-timeline__company { display: block; font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #2dd4f0; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; margin-top: 4px; } .ds-timeline__highlights { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin-top: 12px; } .ds-timeline__highlights li { display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 8px; font-family: 'Exo 2', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: rgba(221,232,245,0.9); line-height: 1.6; } .ds-timeline__prompt { font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace; color: #2dd4f0; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 2px; }

narrative.overview:
This is not a portfolio — it is a live capability record. The aesthetic comes from mission-critical production dashboards, not creative showcases. Every section has an ID, a section number, and a status indicator. The typography is geometric-military: Exo 2 for structure, Fira Code for signal. The palette is a deep navy void with a single high-chroma teal accent that reads like a status LED, not a brand color.

The system rewards the kind of reader who inspects devtools. Section labels are alphanumeric. Ghost watermarks behind section headers are teal-tinted at near-zero opacity. Console output is styled. Tab title changes on blur. These are details that surface only to engineers who look — which is precisely the audience.

Density signals credibility. Sparse, airy layouts read as junior. The skill matrix has 97 nodes. The experience entries carry architecture specifics. The design holds that weight without becoming unreadable.
keyCharacteristics: Sharp corners throughout — border-radius: 0 on every interactive element
Two-font system: geometric sans display + monospace labels
Tonal layering for depth; no drop shadows
Section grammar: number chip + rule + tag label, identical across all sections
All headings uppercase; section labels in ALL_CAPS_WITH_UNDERSCORES
Grid background at 0.4 opacity, pulsing slowly — structural, never decorative

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Signal Teal (#2dd4f0) is the only color that communicates an active, selected, or actionable state. Relay Blue signals secondary hierarchy, never action.

rules.name: The Opacity Ladder Rule
rules.body: Text secondary hierarchy is expressed through opacity steps on Alabaster only. Standard ladder: full → /90 → /65 → /40 → /25. Do not invent new values.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: All surfaces are flat at rest. Tonal layering communicates elevation. Glows are reserved for hover state on interactive nodes. Ambient decorative shadows are prohibited.

rules.name: The Two-Font Rule
rules.body: Every text element uses either Exo 2 or Fira Code. No system fallback fonts, no third faces.

rules.name: The Stroke Pair Rule
rules.body: Section headlines always have two parts: one word in solid command-white, one word in WebkitTextStroke. Never gradient text, never background-clip: text.

rules.name: The No-Card-Grid Rule
rules.body: Cards are not used in grids of identical siblings. Use selector+detail, grouped rows, or timeline patterns instead.

dos: Do use WebkitTextStroke + color: transparent for outlined display text.
Do enforce opacity ladder on Alabaster for text hierarchy: full → /90 → /65 → /40 → /25.
Do keep all interactive corners sharp (border-radius: 0).
Do prefix all section labels with a zero-padded number and use ALL_CAPS_WITH_UNDERSCORES for machine identifiers.
Do use Fira Code exclusively for all metadata, labels, status readouts, section tags, and timestamps.
Do keep Signal Teal below 15% of any given screen surface area.
donts: Don't use background-clip: text with a gradient. Outlined text uses WebkitTextStroke only.
Don't use glassmorphism. No backdrop-filter: blur() on any surface.
Don't build a card grid with identical siblings.
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number, small label, gradient accent).
Don't add a border-left wider than 1px as a decorative colored accent stripe.
Don't use generic glassmorphism portfolios, soft pastel aesthetics, over-animated scrollytelling, or any layout a recruiter would describe as 'cute'.
Don't use Relay Blue for action states or active indicators.
